caption: A person is filming a card-breaking session on a table covered with a tropical-themed mat featuring palm trees. In the beginning, the person's hands are seen manipulating a stack of yellow trading card sleeves. In a small inset window, a man wearing a dark blue t-shirt and headphones is visible, sitting in front of a computer setup. The text "JASPYS LIVE" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are prominently displayed on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the person transitions from handling the sleeves to holding up a specific trading card for the camera. The card features a portrait of a baseball player and a signature, with the name "PAUL MOLITOR" printed at the bottom. The camera focus shifts from the general activity on the table to a close-up of the trading card held between the person's thumb and fingers.
